description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the griest/karma-full-test-env:latest Docker image, with a global before_script that runs yarn install and a cache of node_modules/. Define stages test, build, deploy; in the test stage add a test job that runs npm run test:unit -- --single-run --browsers Chrome, saves test/reports/ as an artifact, and a lint job that runs npm run lint. In the build stage add a dist job that runs npm run build:dist, stores the dist/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to tags and the master branch. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test, copies test/reports to public, injects an iframe-resizer script into the HTML files via sed -i -e 's/<head>/<head><script type="application/javascript" src="https://unpkg.com/iframe-resizer@3.5.14/js/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js"><\/script>/g' public/reports/{unit,coverage/lcov-report}/index.html, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Also in deploy add a publish job that depends on dist, writes the NPM auth token from $NPM_TOKEN to ~/.npmrc, copies src/renderer/game to the current directory, runs npm publish, and runs only on tags.
